title: caularthron bivalvatulum
side_effects: Caularthron bivalvatulum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal irritation, nausea, and diarrhea due to its high saponin content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to kidney damage and electrolyte imbalances. In rare cases, it may cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, especially in individuals with pre-existing sensitivities. Furthermore, improper use of the Caularthron bivalvatulum can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse health consequences.
